events.name: PUTT_UP
events.description: Roll the ball up (north) until blocked (keyboard keyMap or d-pad)

events.name: PUTT_DOWN
events.description: Roll the ball down (south) until blocked (keyboard keyMap or d-pad)

events.name: PUTT_LEFT
events.description: Roll the ball left (west) until blocked (keyboard keyMap or d-pad)

events.name: PUTT_RIGHT
events.description: Roll the ball right (east) until blocked (keyboard keyMap or d-pad)

events.name: TILE_CLICK
events.description: Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { x, y } on tile click

events.name: UNIT_CLICK
events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click

events.name: HOLE_IN
events.description: Emits when the ball rolls onto the cup cell

events.name: NEXT_HOLE
events.description: Emits to advance to the next hole

events.name: PLAY_AGAIN
events.description: Emits to restart the course from hole 1
